summary_en: チノー announced a material dividend change (special dividend). Reframes the return-of-capital baseline.
summary_jp: チノーが配当方針変更を開示（特別配当）。資本還元基準が刷新。

summary_en: チノー authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: チノーが自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。
